expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default payload type
expectations.evidence: Other changes: 'silently switch from Legacy to Minimal webhook payloads on upgrade'

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings functional: wrong obsolete version, stale docs

expectations.text: Does NOT flag the ~30 builder extension methods with Legacy defaults (pre-existing, not changed in the PR)
expectations.evidence: No mention of builder extension Legacy defaults

expectations.text: Flags stale WebhookSettings.cs docs as a side-effect of the constant value change
expectations.evidence: Suggestions: stale remarks on PayloadType — 'this PR is the natural moment to fix it'

expectations.text: Identifies affected consumers outside the PR (WebhookSettings, UmbracoBuilder, or WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions)
